entries.reason: handleSandboxExec is the sandboxed code-execution boundary by design. Container isolation + command allowlist + payload caps mitigate AI-009. Not an LLM-output sink.
Fortify bulkhead.Execute / circuitBreaker.Execute pattern, not a DB query. AI-012 false positive on the substring "Execute".
Same Fortify Execute pattern as the previous AI-012 entry; not LLM-to-DB.
internal/risk/detector.go is the detection code that scans for eval/exec patterns. The detector itself is not invoking eval/exec. AI-049 false positive.
risk/detector_test.go test fixture string for the detector. Not real eval/exec usage.
risk/detector_test.go test fixture string. Not real eval/exec usage.
.github/workflows/docs.yml `id-token: write` is a GitHub Actions permissions field, not a secret value. Standard for OIDC token issuance.
Exercise YAML — `token: string` is a TypeScript function parameter type annotation in an exercise about HTTP authentication. Not a real secret.
Exercise YAML — same TypeScript function parameter pattern as the previous IAC-351. Not a real secret.
docker-compose.demo.yml is the throwaway demo environment with intentionally weak fixed creds (temper:temper). Demo only, not production.
